description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet features a dark, likely wood or metal top surface and a contrasting drawer section, with one visible drawer on the right side and an open shelf on the left. The drawer has a simple, horizontal handle, and the cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a slightly elevated profile. The overall finish appears sleek and smooth, with a subtle sheen that suggests a lacquered or painted surface. The proportions and style indicate it is designed for small office or home office environments, providing both storage and a surface for placing items. Its sturdy construction and clean lines make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A compact, modern filing cabinet with a dark top, a single drawer with a horizontal handle, and an open shelf, elevated on four angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf on the left and a single drawer with a handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the drawer's handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and leg structure.
